title: JustSearch platform-paths contract v1
description: Canonical specification for resolving the JustSearch data directory. Every language implementation (Java PlatformPaths.java, Node scripts/lib/platform-paths.mjs, Rust modules/shell/src-tauri/.../platform_paths.rs) reads this contract and a fixture set; the cross-language contract test (modules/configuration/.../PlatformPathsContractTest) asserts identical outputs for the same inputs. Drift becomes a test failure, not a runtime silent-wrong-path failure.

resolveDataDir.description: Precedence chain. Each source is checked in order; the first non-blank value wins. If none match, fall through to platformDefault for the current OS.

sources.note: Java only; Node + Rust have no sysprops and skip this source

postProcessing.name: expandUserHomePlaceholder
postProcessing.description: Replace literal ${user.home} with the user home dir; refuses unexpanded placeholders by raising an error.

_runnersField: Optional per-fixture runners array. Allowed values: 'java', 'node', 'rust'. Empty/omitted = all runners. Runners not in the list skip the fixture (e.g., when an env-driven branch can't be hermetically reproduced).

fixtures.name: platform_default_windows_localappdata_set
fixtures.runnersNote: Java cannot hermetically override System.getenv('LOCALAPPDATA') at runtime. The Node twin exercises this branch; the Java implementation is identical in logic (LOCALAPPDATA-then-userHome\AppData\Local\JustSearch) and would need a refactor that injects an env-lookup callable to participate. Considered out of scope for tempdoc 501; revisit if a Windows-host bug is found in PlatformPaths.getPlatformDefault.

fixtures.name: rust_env_var_set
fixtures.runnersNote: Env-var-set branch is platform-agnostic in the resolver. Fixture omits 'platform' so the Rust harness exercises it on whichever host runs the test.

fixtures.name: rust_env_var_with_user_home_placeholder
fixtures.runnersNote: Exercises the ${user.home} expansion branch. Platform-agnostic — the expander reads $HOME / %USERPROFILE% under override.
